name: workunit-load-unit-missing
description: `Load.unit` is required when `Load.value` is a bare scalar (§5.12) — a scalar has no nested slot to carry the unit instead (unlike the `absolute`/`range` Target variants, where it may live nested pre-normalization, §8.3 step 2). A scalar-valued `load` with `unit` omitted MUST be rejected.
